case_title: VALENTINA BORODKINA VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORODKINA, VALENTINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,050.00 FILED BY BORODKINA, VALENTINA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED AUG-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS HELPED BY MIKHAIL LUNSKIY--RUSSIAN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MONELLE PALENCIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE - SECTIONS 1A AND 1B ; 4A AND 4B ALL FILLED OUT) (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED AUG-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
